package rulecoverage

func PositiveTestHelpersDuplicatedAcrossPackages() string {
    ruleID := "test_helpers_duplicated_across_packages"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Near-identical helper builders or setup code duplicated across test packages."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
